turns.name: SARNER
turns.text: I am stating here and now that the record has absolutely nothing in it to justify any such assumption. And not only that, Your Honor, the District Judge, up the secrecy of the Grand Jury. He refused. The witnesses were available to testify. The government said it would not

turns.name: UNKNOWN JUSTICE
turns.text: Suppose that Mr. Beilis had voluntarily surrendered the records to the Internal Revnue Service and subsequently one of his other partners had been prosecuted in a tax fraud case. What position would he have had with respect to claiming the Fifth Amendment if the records were introduced? records, and another one, Mr. Kolsby, let us say, were involved in a criminal investigation, that Mr. Kolsby would not be able to claim that there was any violation of his Couch, the personal compulsion was addressed to Mr. Beilis, it wasn’t addressed to one of the other partners.
